channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dog fouling on Burrow Road pavement, 12th April
item.description:
Thursday 9th April at 9.06am someone let their dog foul on the pavement outside the front doors of 10 and 12 Burrow Road. Has since already been removed by a resident but not properly cleaned. Have clear photo evidence of the dog and owner.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 11, Burrow Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: ParishGate woods neads fire breaks as advised by LFB. Against. Houses, 12th April
item.description:
There neads to be fire breaks by houses as recommended by LFB Bexley is one one the worst London boroughs for this. There has bean regular fires in the past and is only a matter of time before a more serious fire happens. The trees and vegetation have also help push over our boundary fence that we would like to replace. Please ring me to discuss this on 07932793297. Tony crane. 39 ParishGate drive DA15 8TJ
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 39, Parish Gate Drive, Falconwood, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 12th April
item.description:
Please remove - many thanks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Erebus Drive, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicle with broken windows plus abandoned three fridges on the back. Dangerous, 12th April
item.description:
Abandoned fridges dangerous

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cossall Walk, Peckham, Greater London

item.title: Fly tip pitside no 10 Plaistow Lane , Sundridge Park Village, 12th April
item.description:
Please remove. Thank you Cllr Alisa Igoe

item.title: Road markings on Herne hill road, 12th April
item.description:
Road markings on Herne hill road between Denmark hill and Herne hill are no longer visible
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 75, Herne Hill, Herne Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A door, a massive kids toy and a dryer left sitting in the common stairwell for 2 months now., 12th April
item.description:
This area has looked like this for over two months now (block 20-49 Warburton House) The cleaning and maintenance on this estate are absolutely unacceptable. It’s embarrassing having to invite friends over.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Warburton Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: New bin and accumulating rubbish issue, 12th April
item.description:
This new bin has been left outside the company that delivers food for over a week. Food has been left in the street including several litres of milk - now it has become another fly tipping spot on yorkton street with a ton of stuff accumulating.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Yorkton Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken Electrical Post, 12th April
item.description:
This has been here for over a year now and needs to be removed as I tripped over it today because my dog tugged on its lead

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1A, Valliers Wood Road, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Furniture and other rubbish on street corner, 12th April
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lisford Street, Peckham, Greater London

item.title: Polystyrene fly tipped by recycling banks, 12th April
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cooden Close, Plaistow, Greater London

item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load (Estates)

item.title: Three bags and one mattress fly tipped, 12th April
item.description:
Three bags and a mattress fly tipped

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brook Lane, Sundridge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large deep pothole - been in situ for months, 12th April
item.description:
Just as the lane which is the slip road off the A282/M25 is about to merge onto the dual carriageway (Bob Dunn Way) there is a large deep area of pothole(s) which is now not possible to swerve around to avoid. This has been in situ for months but is now much worse. It's a botched previous repair. I now go up the traffic lights and turn left onto the Bob Dunn Way to avoid it. This is likely to cause tyre/suspension damage

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Yorkshire Grove playground rubbish, 12th April
item.description:
Self explanatory

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Gunstor Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More fly tipping outside front of property, 12th April
item.description:
This is the second time in two weeks that I have reported fly tipping in the same spot. Every week people use this block of flats as a dumping ground. Please not the address on the box is Flat 1, Barbel Court, please put cameras around the area

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clapton Common, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
